title: Keto Portuguese Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew that's low in carbs and high in fat. Made with tender chunks of meat and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomatoes, broth, and vegetables. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Season with keto stew seasoning to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
